data.title: Comstock Highlights Solar Recycling Pivot and Debt-Free Balance Sheet
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Comstock Mining ( (LODE) ).

On March 24, 2026, Comstock reported its full-year 2025 achievements and outlined its 2026 outlook, highlighting a strategic shift toward solar recycling and critical metals recovery alongside its Nevada mining assets and Bioleum renewable fuels affiliate. During 2025 and early 2026, the company completed an oversubscribed $57.5 million equity raise, eliminated all debt, expanded its board with representatives of major shareholders and secured substantial power capacity to monetize Nevada real estate while separating Bioleum through $35 million of strategic investments and a $65 million convertible preferred stake.

Operationally, Comstock Metals achieved full permitting and R2v3/RIOS certification for what it describes as the first zero-landfill, industry-scale solar panel recycling facility in Nevada, began installing equipment for a second-quarter 2026 startup and established logistics hubs and master service agreements to capture growing end-of-life solar demand across major U.S. markets. The company also advanced plans for a second Nevada facility, initiated design work on refining tailings, and positioned itself as a leading scalable solution provider in an emerging solar recycling market.

Within its mining segment for 2025, Comstock monetized northern district claims for about $3 million while adding over 238 acres of Lyon County mineral properties, purchased the Haywood industrial mineral site to support the Dayton mine plan and engaged potential buyers for its Nevada mining assets amid rising gold and silver prices. Management emphasized that stronger precious metals markets and geopolitical uncertainty are enhancing the value and monetization prospects of its historic Nevada properties, creating upside for both recycling and mining stakeholders.

For Bioleum, Comstock completed the separation of its fuels portfolio into the Oklahoma-based entity and supported its growth through a $13 million strategic pre-Series A investment from Marathon Petroleum subsidiaries and a $20 million Series A round in 2025, with further funding planned in early 2026. Comstock exchanged a five-year $65 million commitment into convertible preferred stock representing 32.5 million underlying Bioleum shares and advanced collaborative R&D with the National Laboratory of the Rockies and MIT on low-cost, high-energy renewable fuel technologies, reinforcing the company’s dual-track growth in critical metals recovery and renewable fuels.

The most recent analyst rating on (LODE) stock is a Hold with a $2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Comstock Mining stock, see the LODE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LODE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LODE is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (persistent cash burn, volatile revenues, and recent loss expansion) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Offsetting these, the earnings call and recent corporate actions point to improved liquidity and a clearer funding path (debt elimination, sizable equity raises) to execute on the solar recycling buildout, while valuation signals are limited due to negative earnings.

To see Spark’s full report on LODE stock, click here.

More about Comstock Mining

Comstock Inc., listed on the NYSE as LODE, operates in the metals recovery and renewable fuels industries, having transitioned from a junior mining company into a vertically integrated player focused on solar panel recycling, critical metals recovery and related mining assets. The company also holds a significant stake in Oklahoma-based Bioleum Corporation, which develops renewable fuel technologies in partnership with strategic energy and industrial investors.

Average Trading Volume: 1,884,768

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $198.4M

For an in-depth examination of LODE stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Tower appoints seasoned interim CFO to steer finance during transition
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Tower Limited ( (AU:TWR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Tower Limited has appointed experienced finance executive Simon Hoole as interim chief financial officer, effective 1 May and subject to regulatory approvals, to ensure continuity while it continues recruiting for a permanent CFO. Hoole brings extensive experience across insurance, financial services and large-scale transformation, having previously held senior roles at Datacom, Villa Maria Estate, Resolution Life and AMP Group, while outgoing interim CFO Angus Shelton is recognised for steering Tower through a period of significant change and helping to position the business for future growth.

The leadership transition underscores Tower’s focus on maintaining financial stability and regulatory confidence during an ongoing executive search process. By installing a seasoned interim CFO with a track record in complex, regulated environments, the insurer aims to support its strategic progress and reassure stakeholders that its finance function will remain robust through the changeover period.

More about Tower Limited

Tower Limited is a New Zealand-incorporated insurer listed on both the NZX and ASX under the ticker TWR. The company operates within the insurance and broader financial services landscape, focusing on regulated financial activities that require strong governance, risk management and regulatory oversight.

For a thorough assessment of TWR stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Longino & Cardenal boosts profitability and cuts debt despite 2025 loss
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Longino & Cardenal SpA ( (IT:LON) ) is now available.

Longino & Cardenal reported 2025 consolidated revenue of €35.3 million, down 4.4% mainly due to the closure of its New York branch, but achieved a higher contribution margin of 25.8% and a 65.4% jump in adjusted EBITDA to €1.5 million. Performance was mixed across geographies, with strong growth in Hong Kong offset by a decline in Dubai and only partial contributions from the shuttered U.S. unit.

The group’s operating profitability and efficiency improved, with adjusted EBIT tripling to €0.9 million and net financial debt reduced to €4.9 million, more than €1.1 million lower than a year earlier. Nevertheless, Longino & Cardenal closed the year with a net loss of €0.7 million, weighed down by non-recurring costs linked to the U.S. exit and higher financial charges, while management emphasized that these strategic actions have strengthened the balance sheet and laid the groundwork for sustainable medium-term growth in the high-end restaurant segment.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:LON) stock is a Buy with a EUR2.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Longino & Cardenal SpA stock, see the IT:LON Stock Forecast page.

More about Longino & Cardenal SpA

Longino & Cardenal S.p.A. is an Italian company specializing in the sourcing, selection and distribution of rare and premium foods, serving as a benchmark supplier to high-end restaurants in Italy and abroad. The group operates through international subsidiaries in markets including Hong Kong, Dubai and, until its closure in 2025, New York, with a focus on top-tier gastronomy and fine dining catering.

Average Trading Volume: 5,426

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €4.69M

data.title: Lithium Argentina Secures US$130 Million Ganfeng-Backed Loan to Advance Joint Venture Projects
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Lithium Argentina ( (TSE:LAR) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 20, 2026, Lithium Argentina AG entered into a loan agreement with GFL International, a subsidiary of China’s Ganfeng Lithium Group, securing access to up to US$130 million over a six-year term at SOFR plus 2.5%. The financing supports a broader framework to form a new joint venture that will consolidate Ganfeng’s Pozuelos-Pastos Grandes project with Lithium Argentina’s Pastos Grandes and Sal de la Puna assets into the PPG venture, where Ganfeng will hold 67% and Lithium Argentina 33% based on resources, capital contributions and technology inputs.

Under the deal, Lithium Argentina agreed to allocate up to 50% of its offtake from PPG’s initial development phase, capped at 6,000 tonnes per year of lithium carbonate equivalent, to the lender at market prices and, before PPG production starts, to sell Ganfeng up to 6,000 tpa of LCE from its unallocated Cauchari-Olaroz entitlement. The loan, prepayable without penalty and secured by Lithium Argentina’s equity in PPG, is conditional on the company securing additional capital to meet its January 2027 convertible note obligations, underscoring both its funding needs and its deepening strategic alignment with Ganfeng in Argentina’s lithium sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:LAR) stock is a Buy with a C$13.65 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lithium Argentina stock, see the TSE:LAR Stock Forecast page.

More about Lithium Argentina

Lithium Argentina AG is a lithium-focused mining and development company with principal offices in Zug, Switzerland, and Vancouver, Canada. The company’s core assets include interests in the Pastos Grandes, Sal de la Puna and Cauchari-Olaroz lithium projects in Argentina, positioning it within the global battery materials supply chain.

Average Trading Volume: 319,888

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$1.58B

Find detailed analytics on LAR stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An announcement from Property For Industry Limited ( (NZ:PFI) ) is now available.

Property for Industry Limited has signalled it is moving ahead with plans for a potential 6.5-year senior secured fixed-rate bond issue to New Zealand retail and institutional investors and Australian institutional investors, after previously postponing related investor meetings due to volatile market conditions. Full details of the prospective offer are expected in the week beginning 30 March 2026, with the bonds to be issued as a new tranche of an existing quoted debt class on the NZX Debt Market and Westpac, Bank of New Zealand, Craigs Investment Partners and Forsyth Barr appointed to lead the transaction, underscoring PFI’s ongoing use of debt capital markets to support its industrial property growth strategy.

More about Property For Industry Limited

Property for Industry Limited is an NZX-listed industrial property specialist that owns more than 90 properties valued at over $2 billion across strategic locations in New Zealand. Since listing in 1994, the company has built a diversified portfolio serving industrial tenants and investors, aiming to deliver long-term, consistent returns through focused capital deployment and sector expertise.

data.title: Denali Therapeutics Gains FDA Approval for AVLAYAH Therapy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Denali Therapeutics ( (DNLI) ) is now available.

On March 25, 2026, Denali Therapeutics announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted accelerated approval to AVLAYAH (tividenofusp alfa-eknm), an enzyme replacement therapy for neurologic manifestations of Hunter syndrome in presymptomatic or symptomatic pediatric patients weighing at least 5 kg before advanced neurologic impairment. The therapy, the first new U.S. treatment for Hunter syndrome in nearly two decades and the first FDA-approved brain-penetrant biologic leveraging the transferrin receptor to cross the blood-brain barrier, is enabled by Denali’s TransportVehicle platform and earned the company a Rare Pediatric Disease Priority Review Voucher.

The approval is based on Phase 1/2 data showing a 91% reduction in cerebrospinal fluid heparan sulfate, with most treated children reaching biomarker levels comparable to individuals without the disease, while continued approval depends on confirmatory results from the ongoing global Phase 2/3 COMPASS trial. AVLAYAH, administered once weekly and expected to be available in the U.S. shortly after approval, is viewed by clinicians and patient advocates as a potential new standard of care that addresses long-standing neurologic needs in Hunter syndrome and exemplifies a biomarker-driven regulatory pathway that could speed development of therapies for other rare pediatric conditions.

The most recent analyst rating on (DNLI) stock is a Buy with a $30.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Denali Therapeutics stock, see the DNLI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DNLI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DNLI is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (widening losses, zero revenue in 2024–2025, and ongoing cash burn). This is partly offset by strong technical momentum (price above key moving averages with positive MACD) and constructive corporate events that improve funding and highlight meaningful upcoming regulatory/clinical milestones, while valuation remains constrained by loss-making results and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on DNLI stock, click here.

More about Denali Therapeutics

Denali Therapeutics Inc., based in South San Francisco and listed on Nasdaq as DNLI, is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing biologic medicines that can cross the blood-brain barrier to treat neurodegenerative and lysosomal storage diseases. Its proprietary TransportVehicle platform is designed to deliver enzyme replacement and other biotherapeutics to the whole body, including the central nervous system, targeting rare conditions such as Hunter syndrome (MPS II).

Average Trading Volume: 1,633,416

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.34B

See more data about DNLI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Selkirk Copper Extends High-Grade Zones in Minto Mine Restart Push
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Venerable Ventures ( (TSE:SCMI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Selkirk Copper reported new drill results from its 50,000 metre Phase 1 program at the Minto mine, showing expanded high-grade mineralization at the Minto North and Minto East zones and confirming multiple stacked lenses that remain open for further growth. Shallow mineralization at the Ridgetop and Area 118 zones continues to extend beyond current open-pit outlines, supporting potential expansion of near-surface resources as the company refines underground and open-pit development plans and advances a Preliminary Economic Assessment targeted for mid-2026.

Four drill rigs have now completed 97% of the Phase 1 program, with results from roughly half of the drilling released to date and additional assays to come in the first half of 2026. The updated drilling and on-site operational work are sharpening Selkirk Copper’s restart plans for Minto, with implications for increased mine life, optionality between underground and open-pit mining, and enhanced project economics for stakeholders if the resource growth is confirmed.

More about Venerable Ventures

Selkirk Copper Mines Inc. is a Canadian mining company focused on the Minto copper-gold-silver mine in Yukon, where it is advancing a restart strategy. The company is targeting both underground and open-pit resource expansion, positioning itself as a copper-focused producer with meaningful gold and silver by-products in the North American base metals sector.

Average Trading Volume: 715,521

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$101.1M

data.title: Smart Capital Completes Marcap Acquisition to Bolster Central Italy Platform
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Smart Capital S.P.A. ( (IT:SMCAP) ) is now available.

Smart Capital S.p.A. has completed the acquisition of 100% of Marcap S.p.A., an industrial holding based in Recanati, for €4.67 million, while its technology vertical Smart4Tech S.p.A. has acquired Marcap’s advisory business unit, spun off into MARCAP Advisory, for €0.43 million. The deal strengthens Smart Capital’s presence and deal origination capacity in central Italy, broadens its entrepreneurial shareholder network through the reinvestment of Marcap’s current shareholders in Smart Capital’s capital for about €4 million by March 2026, and enhances its corporate finance advisory platform by leveraging Marcap’s expertise and relationships to support future growth and value creation.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:SMCAP) stock is a Buy with a EUR2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Smart Capital S.P.A. stock, see the IT:SMCAP Stock Forecast page.

More about Smart Capital S.P.A.

Smart Capital S.p.A. is a permanent capital industrial holding company focused on private equity and private investments in public equity, targeting Italian small and medium-sized enterprises at various stages, including listed, unlisted and pre-IPO. The group pursues long-term, entrepreneurial investments in niche market leaders with strong management teams and value creation plans aligned with ESG best practices in Italy and abroad.

On March 25, 2026, Transportadora de Gas del Sur S.A. filed a Form 6-K in the United States to furnish its annual report and consolidated financial statements for the year ended December 31, 2025. The filing includes audited consolidated statements of income, financial condition, changes in shareholders’ equity, and cash flows, along with a glossary of regulatory and industry terms that frame the company’s operations within Argentina’s natural gas sector.

By making these 2025 results and disclosures available to U.S. and Argentine regulators and investors, the company reinforces its reporting transparency and compliance as a foreign issuer. The detailed documentation of its financial position and industry context provides stakeholders with an updated view of its performance and regulatory environment, potentially informing valuation, risk assessment, and strategic expectations for its role in the Argentine gas market.

data.title: CAVA Group Amends Credit Agreement to Bolster Liquidity
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

CAVA Group, Inc. ( (CAVA) ) has shared an update.

On March 20, 2026, CAVA Group, Inc. entered into Amendment No. 3 to its existing Credit Agreement with various financial institutions and JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. acting as administrative agent. The amendment, formalized and signed on March 25, 2026 by Chief Financial Officer Tricia Tolivar, reflects an updated material definitive financing arrangement that may influence the company’s capital structure and access to liquidity.

The execution of this amended credit facility underscores CAVA Group’s continued reliance on bank financing to support its operations and potential expansion plans. Stakeholders, including lenders and shareholders, can view the revised agreement as a refinement of the company’s borrowing terms and banking relationships, which could affect future financial flexibility and funding costs.

The most recent analyst rating on (CAVA) stock is a Buy with a $80.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CAVA Group, Inc. stock, see the CAVA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CAVA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CAVA is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improving but uneven financial performance (notably the 2025 revenue/margin step-down and volatile free cash flow) and a positive earnings-call outlook for continued growth and liquidity. Technicals are supportive but look overbought. Valuation is the largest drag due to the very high P/E and no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on CAVA stock, click here.

More about CAVA Group, Inc.

CAVA Group, Inc. operates in the restaurant and food service industry, focusing on Mediterranean-inspired cuisine and related offerings. As a publicly traded company, it uses credit facilities and other financing arrangements to support its corporate operations and growth strategy, working with large financial institutions for its capital needs.
